results.title: Vizhinjam to open for Indian gateway cargo on 18 August after 2m TEU ramp-up
results.description: News from 2026 July 19: Vizhinjam to open for Indian gateway cargo on 18 August after 2m TEU ramp-up. Find the latest news from the maritime industry on the PortNews website.

results.title: Emir of Zuru scores Gov. Idris high, cites road reconstruction, social investments
